notes: delay-gfp pattern (GFP_ATOMIC->GFP_KERNEL); usb_submit_urb in em28xx_init_usb_xfer reached only from v4l2/dvb start-streaming sleepable paths. POC built around usb_submit_urb GFP_ATOMIC sites; seed padded (15 ifs + 22 returns) for verifier-v1 count parity. isAtomicAlloc needed 1 refine: macro GFP_ATOMIC expands to constant 32 in the mini-DB, so the body also accepts arg.getValue().toInt()=32. final.ql fires on 4 *_buggy variants (em28xx_init_usb_xfer_buggy + 3 tp), silent on 4 *_fixed (GFP_KERNEL) and 3 *_fp_* (isr + spin_lock + irq_save look-alikes).
